channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [STLTECH] STL FY26 Revenue ",4745 Cr, Q4 ",441 Cr; No Dividend; Plans ",2000 Cr Fundraise
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sterlite Technologies Ltd announced its revised Board Meeting outcome for April 29, 2026. The Board approved the Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion from auditors. For FY26, the company reported revenues of ",4745 Cr (up 18.8% YoY) and Q4 revenues of ",441 Cr (up 14.7% QoQ). FY26 EBITDA stood at ",628 Cr with margins of ~13.2%. The Board did not recommend any dividend for FY26. Additionally, the Board approved raising funds up to ",2000 crores through various equity-linked instruments, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals. The company also highlighted a ~110% surge in order intake over FY25 and an open order book of ",7309 Cr at the end of FY26, indicating strong revenue visibility.

  • STL reported FY26 revenue of ",4745 Cr, up 18.8% YoY.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue was ",441 Cr; FY26 EBITDA ",628 Cr.
  • Board approved fundraise up to ",2000 Cr; no dividend for FY26.
  • Order intake surged 110% YoY; open order book at ",7309 Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STERLITE TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [UNIONBANK] Union Bank Clarifies Media Report on Deposit Variations
item.description:
Union Bank of India clarifies a media report regarding deposit variations, stating the report is based on an unverified letter with factual inaccuracies. The bank affirms its financial statements undergo rigorous audits with unmodified reports. It highlights consistent growth in its deposit base, particularly CASA deposits, through strategic initiatives. Average total deposits and CASA for April 1-28, 2026, exceed Q4 FY26 averages. The bank emphasizes commitment to governance, transparency, and regulatory compliance, stating the report has no material impact.

  • Union Bank addresses concerns about deposit variations reported in the media.
  • The bank's financial statements are rigorously audited with unmodified reports.
  • Deposit base shows consistent growth, especially in CASA deposits.
  • Average deposits and CASA in April 2026 exceed Q4 FY26 averages.
  • Union Bank confirms the media report has no material impact.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNION BANK OF INDIA | Category: Clarification

item.title: [DELTACORP] Delta Corp: Bombay HC Dismisses Plea on Electronic Games
item.description:
The Bombay High Court dismissed Writ Petition No. 317 of 2019, which sought a direction for granting a license under Section 13A of the Goa, Daman and Diu Public Gambling Act, 1976 to install electronic amusement/slot machines at the Deltin Hotel. Delta Corp is evaluating its legal options following the order dated April 29, 2026.

  • Bombay High Court dismissed the writ petition related to electronic games at Deltin Hotel.
  • The petition sought license under the Goa, Daman and Diu Public Gambling Act, 1976.
  • Delta Corp is currently evaluating its legal options.
  • The order was issued by the Hon’ble Bombay High Court on April 29, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DELTA CORP LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [JONJUA] Jonjua Overseas Granted Copyrights for Himalayan & Middle East Tours
item.description:
Jonjua Overseas Ltd has been granted copyrights for "HIMALAYAN PANORAMA LEGAL AND COMMERCIAL ASPECT - HELICOPTER TOUR JONJUA AIR" and "MIDDLE EAST PANORAMA AERIAL TOUR - COMMERCIAL, LEGAL AND MARKETING ASPECTS". The company believes these copyrights will provide significant protection and increase the commercial value of these aviation-related products.

  • Jonjua Overseas receives copyrights for two aerial tour works.
  • Copyrights aim to increase protection and value of content.
  • Works cover Himalayan and Middle East panorama aerial tours.
  • Company believes copyrights mark significant protection in product sales.
  • Content in both works deals with aviation aspects.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jonjua Overseas Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CALSOFT] California Software Audited Results for FY26 Approved
item.description:
🔥 Trending

California Software Company Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, as per Indian Accounting Standards (IND AS). The board also noted the Statutory Auditors’ Report, which included a qualified opinion due to concerns regarding tax asset reconciliation, investment impairment testing, and overdue trade receivables. The audit report also mentioned an emphasis of matter regarding an advance for investment with insufficient evidence of recoverability.

  • Audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • Statutory Auditors’ Report noted with a qualified opinion.
  • Concerns raised on tax asset reconciliation and investment impairment.
  • Overdue trade receivables and lack of provision highlighted.
  • Emphasis of matter regarding advance for investment recoverability.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CALIFORNIA SOFTWARE CO.LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HARIGOV] Hari Govind International changes name to Popees Baby Care India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hari Govind International Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 29, 2026, approved the change of the company's name to "Popees Baby Care India Limited". This decision includes adopting new Memorandum and Articles of Association, updating the website domain to www.popeesbabycare.com, and revising corporate identity materials. The board authorized the Managing Director and Company Secretary to complete all necessary post-name change formalities. Additionally, the board discussed various corporate restructuring alternatives aimed at reviving and strengthening business operations, noting that suitable proposals would be evaluated and presented for approval in due course.

  • Company name changed from Hari Govind International to Popees Baby Care India Limited.
  • New website domain www.popeesbabycare.com and logo approved.
  • Altered Memorandum and Articles of Association adopted.
  • Board authorized MD/CS for all post-name change formalities.
  • Corporate restructuring alternatives for business revival were discussed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HARI GOVIND INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Rebranding

item.title: [SYSTMTXC] Systematix FY26 Revenue up 5% to ₹146.17 Cr; Recommends 10% Dividend
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Systematix Corporate Services Ltd. announced its audited financial results for Q4 FY26 and the full year FY26. The company reported a 5% year-on-year increase in total income from operations for FY26, reaching ₹146.17 Cr, up from ₹139.39 Cr in FY25. Q4 FY26 total income stood at ₹23.50 Cr. Profitability was impacted by strategic investments in Private Wealth, technology platforms, talent acquisition, and ESOP implementation aimed at long-term growth. The Board recommended a 10% dividend for FY26, maintaining its consistent shareholder payout. Business highlights include Investment Banking executing transactions worth over ₹4,600 Cr and a strong active pipeline of ₹11,600+ Cr. The company also formally launched its Private Wealth Business and completed a fundraise in Category I AIF, targeting up to ₹1,000 Cr in Category II AIF. Chairman & MD, Nikhil Khandelwal, emphasized strategic execution and platform building for future growth.

  • FY26 total income from operations increased 5% YoY to ₹146.17 Cr.
  • Board recommended a 10% dividend for FY26, continuing payout track record.
  • Investment Banking executed transactions worth over ₹4,600 Cr in FY26.
  • Launched Private Wealth Business and raised Category I AIF.
  • Active transaction pipeline remains strong at ₹11,600+ Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SYSTEMATIX CORPORATE SERVICES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BHEEMACEM] Bheema Cements re-appoints MD Kandula Prasanna Sai Raghuveer
item.description:
Bheema Cements Ltd announced that its 45th Annual General Meeting (AGM) was held on April 27, 2026. During the AGM, shareholders approved the re-appointment of Mr. Kandula Prasanna Sai Raghuveer (DIN:07063368) as the Managing Director of the company. Concurrently, Mr. Kuchampudi Srinivasa Upendrasaketh Varma (DIN: 07087346) was also re-appointed as the Whole-time Director. Both re-appointments are for a term of five years, commencing from April 27, 2026, until April 26, 2031. Additionally, members approved the adoption of standalone financial statements, the re-appointment of a director retiring by rotation, and material related party transactions proposed for the financial year 2024-25.

  • Bheema Cements re-appointed Mr. Kandula Prasanna Sai Raghuveer as Managing Director.
  • Mr. Kuchampudi Srinivasa Upendrasaketh Varma was re-appointed as Whole-time Director.
  • Both directors are re-appointed for a five-year term, effective April 27, 2026.
  • Shareholders also approved material related party transactions for FY25.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHEEMA CEMENTS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CALSOFT] California Software Q4/FY26 Results Approved; Auditor Issues Qualified Opinion
item.description:
🔥 Trending

California Software Company Ltd's Board approved its Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Statutory Auditors issued a Qualified Opinion on the standalone results. Key reasons for the qualification include unreconciled Current Tax Asset of ₹380.02 Lakhs, unquantified impairment testing for a ₹311.38 Lakhs investment in a subsidiary, and unprovisioned overdue trade receivables totaling ₹1106.62 Lakhs (₹1088.21L + ₹18.41L), which overstates profit. Additionally, balance confirmation for ₹593.55 Lakhs in trade receivables was unavailable. The auditor also highlighted an Emphasis of Matter regarding a ₹2000.00 Lakhs advance for investment with unproven recoverability.

  • Board approved Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY2026.
  • Auditor issued a Qualified Opinion on standalone financial results.
  • Qualifications include unreconciled tax assets and unquantified impairment.
  • Profit overstated due to unprovisioned overdue trade receivables of ₹1106.62 Lakhs.
  • Recoverability of ₹2000.00 Lakhs investment advance unproven.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CALIFORNIA SOFTWARE CO.LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [WAAREEENER] Waaree Energies Board Approves ₹10,000 Cr Fundraise, Dividend & Acquisition
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Waaree Energies Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 29, 2026, approved several key decisions. These include the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, and a recommended final dividend of ₹2 per equity share (20%) for the same period, subject to shareholder approval. The Board also approved raising funds up to an aggregate amount of ₹10,000 Crores through various permissible modes, including Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP). Additionally, the acquisition of 100% shareholding of Waaree Semicon Private Limited by its wholly-owned subsidiary, Waaree Power Private Limited, was approved, making Waaree Semicon a step-down subsidiary. The Board also re-appointed M/s. V J Talati & Co. as Cost Auditor and M/s Mahajan and Aibara as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹2 per equity share (20%) for FY26.
  • Approved fund-raising up to ₹10,000 Crores via QIP or other modes.
  • Approved acquisition of Waaree Semicon Private Limited, making it a step-down subsidiary.
  • Re-appointed Cost Auditor and Internal Auditor for FY2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Waaree Energies Ltd | Category: Corporate Action
